Santa Clara County sues Meta for profits from alleged scam ads
articles.summary: Santa Clara County has filed a lawsuit against Meta Platforms Inc. and Instagram LLC, alleging that Meta knowingly profits from scam ads on its platforms while falsely claiming to combat them. The complaint claims Meta's platforms are responsible for one-third of all internet scams in the U.S., generating $7 billion in annual "violating revenue," and that Meta actively facilitates these scams through practices like charging "penalty bids" and disbanding anti-scam teams. The county is seeking an injunction, restitution, and civil penalties under California's False Advertising Law and Unfair Com
articles.content: Santa Clara County has filed a lawsuit against Meta Platforms Inc. and Instagram LLC, alleging that Meta knowingly profits from scam ads on its platforms while falsely claiming to combat them. The complaint claims Meta's platforms are responsible for one-third of all internet scams in the U.S., generating $7 billion in annual "violating revenue," and that Meta actively facilitates these scams through practices like charging "penalty bids" and disbanding anti-scam teams. The county is seeking an injunction, restitution, and civil penalties under California's False Advertising Law and Unfair Competition Law.

articles.title: Phantom Data Centers Didn't Break the Power Grid—They Proved it Was Already Broken
Amgen Inc. stock (US0311621009): focus on Repatha growth as first-quarter 2026 results mix
articles.summary: Amgen Inc. reported mixed first-quarter 2026 results, showing solid revenue growth driven by therapies like Repatha but facing pressure on profitability due to higher operating and R&D costs. The company emphasized the continued double-digit expansion of Repatha sales and progress in integrating Horizon Therapeutics, including rare disease treatments like Tepezza. Amgen also reaffirmed its full-year 2026 revenue guidance, navigating a shifting portfolio mix and competitive biosimilar landscape.
articles.content: Amgen Inc. reported mixed first-quarter 2026 results, showing solid revenue growth driven by therapies like Repatha but facing pressure on profitability due to higher operating and R&D costs. The company emphasized the continued double-digit expansion of Repatha sales and progress in integrating Horizon Therapeutics, including rare disease treatments like Tepezza. Amgen also reaffirmed its full-year 2026 revenue guidance, navigating a shifting portfolio mix and competitive biosimilar landscape.

articles.title: JPMorgan Just Hiked Hewlett Packard Enterprise Price Target to $37: Memory Reversal Powers IT Hardware Rally
articles.summary: JPMorgan raised its price target for Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) to $37 from $27, maintaining an Overweight rating, attributing the increase to easing memory cost pressures and strong earnings momentum. This positive outlook is shared with Dell Technologies, as the entire IT hardware group benefits from a rebalancing of memory supply and fading margin headwinds. HPE's strong Q1 FY2026 performance and the strategic Juniper Networks acquisition support the bullish case, despite integration risks.
articles.content: JPMorgan raised its price target for Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) to $37 from $27, maintaining an Overweight rating, attributing the increase to easing memory cost pressures and strong earnings momentum. This positive outlook is shared with Dell Technologies, as the entire IT hardware group benefits from a rebalancing of memory supply and fading margin headwinds. HPE's strong Q1 FY2026 performance and the strategic Juniper Networks acquisition support the bullish case, despite integration risks.

articles.title: Equinix stock (US29444U7033): Data-center demand stays in focus after recent company updates
articles.summary: Equinix remains a key focus for investors due to robust data-center demand, especially with the growth in AI infrastructure. The company's business model, driven by recurring colocation and interconnection services, positions it at the center of cloud computing and enterprise IT. Investors are closely monitoring Equinix's capacity expansion, capital spending, and ability to meet the increasing demand for secure and low-latency digital infrastructure.
articles.content: Equinix remains a key focus for investors due to robust data-center demand, especially with the growth in AI infrastructure.
